header.subtitle: Get Started
header.title: Setup Your Restaurant
header.description: Complete these steps to launch your restaurant website

restaurantInfo.title: Restaurant Info
restaurantInfo.description: Tell us about your restaurant so we can personalize your experience.

menuUpload.title: Menu
menuUpload.description: Upload your menu and let our AI do the heavy lifting.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose a beautiful theme or let AI create one unique to you.

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: Set up your web address and go live in minutes.

review.title: Review
review.description: Review everything before launching your restaurant website.

errors.completeFailed: Failed to complete setup. Please try again.

help.text: Need help? Contact our support team at

name.label: Restaurant Name
name.hint: The name your customers will see

descriptionFi.label: Description (Finnish)
descriptionFi.hint: Describe your restaurant to Finnish customers

descriptionEn.label: Description (English)
descriptionEn.hint: Describe your restaurant to international customers

menuUpload.title: Upload Your Menu
menuUpload.description: Upload a PDF or image of your menu. Our AI will extract all items, prices, and create translations.

dropZone.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop

success.title: Menu Parsed Successfully!
success.itemsFound: Our AI found {{items}} items in {{categories}} categories

errors.parseFailed: Failed to parse menu. Please try again or upload a different file.

tips.title: Tips for Best Results
tips.tip1: Upload a clear, high-resolution image or well-formatted PDF
tips.tip2: Ensure prices are clearly visible next to each item
tips.tip3: Keep categories (appetizers, mains, etc.) well organized
tips.tip4: Our AI will automatically translate to Finnish, English, and Swedish

themeSelection.title: Choose Your Theme
themeSelection.description: Select a design that matches your brand

aiTheme.title: Create a Unique AI Theme
aiTheme.description: Let our AI design a one-of-a-kind theme based on your restaurant's personality and cuisine

customizeLater.title: Customize Later
customizeLater.description: Not sure? You can always change colors, fonts, and layouts from your admin dashboard after setup. Our themes are fully customizable!

domainSetup.title: Choose Your Domain Type
domainSetup.description: Select how you want your restaurant to be accessed

subdomain.title: Free Subdomain
subdomain.fullDescription: Get a free subdomain on our platform

path.title: Free Path
path.fullDescription: Get a free path on our platform

subdomain.label: Your Subdomain
subdomain.hint: Choose a unique name for your restaurant
subdomain.liveAt: Your website will be live at

customDomain.label: Your Custom Domain
customDomain.hint: Use a domain you already own
customDomain.dnsNote: After setup: You'll need to update your DNS settings to point to our servers. We'll send you detailed instructions via email.

path.label: Your Path
path.hint: Choose a unique path for your restaurant
path.liveAt: Your website will be live at

instantActivation.title: Instant Activation
instantActivation.description: Free domains are available immediately after setup. No waiting required!

upgradeAnytime.title: Upgrade Anytime
upgradeAnytime.description: You can add a custom domain later from your admin dashboard.

availability.readyForYou: This address is ready for you.

basePlatformFee.label: Base Platform Fee
basePlatformFee.description: Only pay when you get orders

aiImages.label: AI Menu Images
aiImages.description: One-time fee for AI-generated food images

readyToLaunch.title: You're All Set!
readyToLaunch.description: Click "Complete Setup" to launch your restaurant website. Your login credentials will be sent to your email address.

payment.title: Payment Information
payment.description: You can add your payment details after setup. We offer various payment methods including credit card, direct debit, and invoice.
